news.headline: Petra Automotive Products partners with Christian Brothers Automotive, serving as preferred chemical provider for CBA franchise locations across the US.
news.summary: A recent partnership has been formed between Petra Automotive Products and Christian Brothers Automotive (CBA), marking Petra as the preferred premium chemical provider for all CBA franchise locations across the country. Launched on October 23, 2024, this collaboration offers franchise owners access to a wide range of high-quality chemical products.

news.headline: Starbucks stock drops following disappointing preliminary quarterly earnings report.
news.summary: A recent report found that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in years. This decrease is attributed to the addition of 300,000 new jobs in the last month alone. The report also highlights that the economy grew by 5.1% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. These positive trends in the job market and economic growth are seen as signs of recovery following the challenges brought on by the global pandemic.

news.headline: Taiwan Construction Industry projected to grow by 4% to reach TWD 784 billion in 2024. CAGR of 3.7% expected, reaching TWD 905.6 billion by 2028.
news.summary: In Dublin, the latest report on the Taiwan Construction Industry reveals significant growth projections. The industry is anticipated to increase by 4.0% to a value of TWD 784 billion by 2024. Over the period of 2024-2028, a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.7% is estimated, with expected construction output reaching TWD 905.6 billion by 2028. This data indicates considerable potential for growth in the Taiwan construction sector.

news.headline: Vietnam's gift card market is projected to reach $1.2 billion by 2028 with annual growth of 14.4% to $0.8 billion in 2024.
news.summary: A recent report on the Vietnam gift card and incentive card market projects significant growth in the industry. It is anticipated that the market will increase by 14.4% annually, reaching a value of US$0.8 billion by 2024. The gift card sector in Vietnam is expected to maintain this growth trajectory, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.7% from 2024 to 2028. This indicates a positive trend in the country's gift card market, showcasing ongoing expansion and market opportunities for businesses in the sector.

news.headline: Global Industrial Construction Projects Tracker for Q3 2024 released, offering analysis on projects by value, start date, and stage. Key data for top 20 projects per region included. Leading contractors highlighted.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Industrial Construction Projects (Q3 2024)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report offers analysis derived from the analyst's construction projects data, presenting total project values and detailed analysis by stage and funding across various regions. The report highlights the top 20 projects in each region, listing the country, stage, and project value. Additionally, it features ranked listings of key operators in the sector, showcasing the leading contractors involved in these projects.

news.headline: Peer launches virtual universe with AI tech, OGE platform on Oct. 23, 2024 in LA, aiming to build global community.
news.summary: Today in Los Angeles, a groundbreaking interactive world-building platform called Peer was unveiled, marking a significant advancement in artificial intelligence technology. This innovative platform integrates multiple AI models with a proprietary Online Game Engine (OGE), enabling users to develop embodied AI creations. The platform is set to revolutionize how AI technology is utilized, opening up exciting possibilities for users.

news.headline: Advantice Health launches three new Triple Paste® products for soothing skin for babies and moms.
news.summary: Advantice Health, the company behind the popular Triple Paste® diaper rash ointments, has introduced three new products aimed at soothing skin for babies and mothers. The launch occurred on October 23, 2024, in Bridgewater, New Jersey. The new products include the Multi-Purpose Rash Ointment, which are designed to be safe and effective. This move expands the company's product line and provides more options for consumers.

news.headline: Parks Associates report: Summer sees strong pro-install for smart home solutions, retail sales to increase for holidays.
news.summary: At the 19th annual CONNECTIONS™ Summit held at CES, a market research firm discussed changes in consumer purchasing behavior. According to Parks Associates' Smart Home Consumer Insights Dashboard, there has been a notable shift in buying habits. The research reveals that channels offering professional installation services, such as residential security and custom integrators, are gaining popularity. This data was shared at the event in Dallas on October 23, 2024. These insights highlight the increasing importance of expert installation services in the consumer market.

news.headline: Concentric AB to delist shares from Nasdaq Stockholm per request from Circle BidCo ApS on Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: In Redditch, England, on October 23, 2024, Concentric AB revealed that their board of directors had submitted a request to delist the company's shares from Nasdaq Stockholm. This decision came in response to a request from Circle BidCo ApS. The move signifies a strategic shift in the company's direction.

news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate rose by 6,750.7% with 27.1 million coins burned recently, along with 400,000 in two separate transactions. Analyst predicts a 355% rally.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (SHIB) has recently caught the attention of traders due to a significant increase in its burn rate and daily transactions. Shibburn data revealed a startling 6,750.7% surge in the burn rate, driven by a massive 27.1 million coin burn that occurred just 15 hours ago. Additionally, two separate transactions resulted in the burning of an additional 400,000 coins within the last 12 hours. Cryptocurrency analyst Javon Marks identified a hidden bull divergence pattern in SHIB's price chart, suggesting the potential for a notable upward movement. Despite the recent surge, Marks has maintained his target price for Shiba Inu. For more information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Environmental research firm Boundless Impact Research & Analytics hires Melissa Harclerode, Ph.D., as Director of Research.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in New York, Boundless Impact Research & Analytics (Boundless), a prominent environmental research and analytics company, revealed the appointment of Melissa Harclerode, Ph.D., as their new Director of Research. This key addition highlights Boundless' dedication to furthering their research efforts.

news.headline: Holland Industrial & Prestige Auctions to auction Honeywell Intelligrated's 280,000 SF manufacturing facility.
news.summary: A manufacturing facility spanning 280,000 square feet owned by a prominent automation systems manufacturer, Honeywell Intelligrated, will be auctioned off through a live webcast event. The auction is being organized by Holland Industrial Group in collaboration with Prestige Auctions.

news.headline: Nov 1 marks Extra Mile Day in 500+ cities, celebrating volunteers who go the extra mile to make a difference.
news.summary: Los Angeles, October 23, 2024 - As part of the Extra Mile Day movement, more than 500 mayors across the United States will recognize volunteers who have gone above and beyond to make a positive impact in their communities. The event, scheduled for November 1, celebrates the efforts of individuals who have contributed significantly to various charitable causes. Through their dedication and passion, these volunteers have made a difference in cities nationwide.

news.headline: Lantern Pharma (NASDAQ: LTRN) to present at ThinkEquity Conference in NYC on Oct 30, 2024 at 10:30 am ET.
news.summary: Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN), an AI company specializing in cancer therapy development to revolutionize the speed and cost of oncology drug research, disclosed plans for a presentation at the ThinkEquity Conference on October 30, 2024, at 10:30 a.m. ET in New York, NY. The event will take place at the Mandarin Oriental, with Lantern management as the key presenters. A webcast of the conference can be accessed via the link: https://www.meetmax.com/sched/event_106721/conference_register.html

news.headline: Boeing's Q3 earnings show a 1% revenue decline to $17.854B, with adjusted loss per share at $10.44. CEO vows transformation amidst cultural challenges.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Boeing Co (NYSE:BA) witnessed a slight decline in revenue, dropping by 1% year-over-year to $17.854 billion, which fell short of the expected $17.931 billion. The adjusted loss per share also worsened, increasing to $10.44 from $3.62 in the same quarter of 2023, missing the anticipated $10.34. These results were attributed to the effects of the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAM) work stoppage and charges on commercial and defense programs that had been previously disclosed. Boeing reported an adjusted operating loss of $5.989 billion for the quarter, significantly higher than the $1.09 billion loss recorded a year earlier. The core operating loss margin stood at (33.6%) compared to (6%) in the previous year. The Commercial Airplanes sector experienced a 5% year-over-year decline in revenue, totaling $7.443 billion, influenced by $3 billion in charges and increased expenses. Deliveries also saw a decrease of 10%, with 116 airplanes delivered during this period.

news.headline: Enphase Energy missed Q3 revenue estimate of $391.979M with $380.9M and earnings at 65 cents falling short. Stock drops 15.2%.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures experienced a decline, with the Dow futures dropping approximately 200 points. Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) saw a significant decrease in its pre-market trading following the announcement of third-quarter financial results below expectations. The company reported Q3 revenue of $380.9 million, falling short of the anticipated $391.979 million. Additionally, Enphase Energy disclosed adjusted earnings of 65 cents per share, missing analyst predictions of 77 cents per share according to Benzinga Pro. Consequently, Enphase Energy shares plummeted by 15.2% in response to the news. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Data Quality Co-Op raises $1.25M to launch platform increasing transparency in $140B first-party data market.
news.summary: Salt Lake City-based Data Quality Co-op (DQC) has secured funding for the development of an innovative platform focused on enhancing data quality and transparency in first-party data exchange. This initiative aims to address a critical industry issue by establishing new benchmarks in data standards. The platform is set to revolutionize the insights industry through its commitment to ensuring accuracy and reliability in data processing. The funding received by DQC will support the organization in achieving this goal, marking a significant step towards improving data practices.

news.headline: ACR Poker raises $20,000 for United Breast Cancer Foundation in annual charity tournament.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in San Jose, Costa Rica, ACR Poker organized its third annual online charity tournament to mark Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The event successfully raised a total of $20,000 for the United Breast Cancer Foundation (UBCF). The support and participation from the poker community were vital in achieving this fundraising milestone.

news.headline: GITAI's Inchworm-type robotic arm passed all tests, achieved TRL6 in a thermal vacuum chamber simulating Lunar South Pole, 2024.
news.summary: In Torrance, California, on October 23, 2024, GITAI USA Inc. revealed that their Inchworm-type Robot Arm, developed by the top space robotics startup, has excelled in tests and reached Technology Readiness Level 6 (TRL6). This achievement came after a comprehensive integrated test, solidifying GITAI's position as a major player in the field.

news.headline: Cisco introduces AI solutions for enhanced employee experiences and productivity. Focus on simplicity, scalability, and user empowerment.
news.summary: Cisco has introduced new artificial intelligence solutions aimed at enhancing collaboration and providing employees with fair and top-notch experiences. These advancements offer IT teams a straightforward deployment process, simplified management, and scalability in various work environments. The goal is to assist businesses in reinventing work processes by leveraging technology.

news.headline: Cisco introduces Webex AI Agent for contact centers, enhancing customer experiences with conversational intelligence.
news.summary: Cisco has introduced a new Webex AI Agent designed to automate contact center inquiries using conversational intelligence, aiming for quicker and more effective issue resolution. The new AI Agent, along with AI Agent Studio and Cisco AI Assistant for Webex Contact Center, are expected to revolutionize the way businesses communicate and provide support to their customers. This innovation will enhance customer service and streamline operations by leveraging advanced technology. Businesses can now employ these tools to efficiently handle customer inquiries and improve overall customer experience.

news.headline: 40% of job seekers avoid companies with unclear stances on key issues. 65% believe companies should speak out.
news.summary: Employers are advised to consider the potential impacts on recruiting and retaining employees when sharing the most recent findings from The Harris Poll. According to the survey conducted in Oklahoma City on October 23, 2024, 65% of job seekers feel that companies should take a stance on important topics. Additionally, half of these individuals emphasize the significance of organizations vocalizing their perspectives.

news.headline: Conduent (Nasdaq: CNDT) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 6, 2024, with conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Florham Park-based Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT) is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 6, before the market opens. The company, known for its technology-driven business solutions, will conduct a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Interested individuals can access the live audio cast, news release, and presentation slides at https://investor.conduent.com.

news.headline: Whole Moon introduces new plant beverages with a creamy taste and whole protein, aiming to drive category growth. Albany, N.Y., Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Whole Moon, based in Albany, New York, recently revealed its latest product line on October 23, 2024, through a press release. The new offering boasts a creamy flavor and complete protein content. The company is excited to introduce this innovative product to the market, demonstrating its commitment to providing high-quality options for consumers.

news.headline: Ayéya launches new ethical products supporting women in West Africa, helping 350,000+ achieve economic independence.
news.summary: In Olympia, Washington on October 23, 2024, a new sustainable wellness brand called Ayéya has been launched to support over 350,000 individuals in West Africa. This beauty and lifestyle brand aims to uphold African customs while providing economic empowerment to local women through responsibly obtained body products.

news.headline: Fashion brand AYA Apparel launches debut collection this Fall 2024, focusing on style, comfort, and sustainability.
news.summary: In Fall 2024, AYA (Anywhere you are) Apparel revealed the debut of its first clothing collection in Miami. The brand aims to combine high-end fashion with eco-conscious practices. AYA Apparel will showcase a diverse selection of ethically procured garments, reflecting its dedication to sustainability and style.

news.headline: ALC-A-CHINO launches non-dairy oat milk hard latte, free of artificial ingredients - a first in the industry.
news.summary: Launching from Basking Ridge, New Jersey on October 23, 2024, ALC-A-CHINO, a prominent spiked coffee brand, introduced their newest offering: a non-dairy hard latte created using natural ingredients and oat milk. This beverage is crafted without artificial colors, flavors, sweeteners, or preservatives to provide a pure and enjoyable experience. The emphasis is on ensuring high quality while meeting consumer demands for a healthier alternative.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures fall due to McDonald's E.coli outbreak and Arm-Qualcomm dispute, Tesla earnings pending.
news.summary: Stock futures experienced a decrease as McDonald's plummeted due to an E. coli outbreak. The ongoing dispute between Arm and Qualcomm intensified. Investors are anticipating Tesla's upcoming earnings report. The Dow Jones futures were down following these developments.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall after McDonald's plummets due to E. coli outbreak; Tesla earnings upcoming.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as seen in Dow Jones futures, which dropped amid news of an E. coli outbreak causing a sharp decline in McDonald's stock. Investors are closely monitoring the situation. Additionally, attention is shifting towards Tesla as they are set to announce their earnings soon. It will be interesting to see how the market reacts to this impending news.

news.headline: Global report on Industrial Construction Projects for Q2 2024 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, analyzing top projects by value, stage, and funding across regions.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Industrial Construction Projects (Q2 2024)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report offers analysis derived from the analyst's construction projects, displaying total project values and examining stages and funding across various regions. It features a list of the top 20 projects per region, detailing country, stage, and project values. Moreover, the report includes rankings of key operators in the sector, highlighting the leading contractors.

news.headline: Ireland's gift card market to reach $0.8 billion in 2024 with 6.5% annual growth, expected to grow by 5.6% CAGR from 2024-2028.
news.summary: A recent report on the Ireland Gift Card and Incentive Card Market projects significant growth in the industry. It is anticipated to increase by 6.5% annually, reaching a total value of US$0.8 billion by 2024. Over the following years until 2028, the sector is predicted to maintain a steady growth trajectory, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.6%. The gift card market in Ireland shows promising signs of expansion, indicating a positive outlook for the future.

news.headline: Eaton to assist in upgrading Miami's Metromover with IIJA funds; aims to enhance reliability for $153 million project.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Eaton, an intelligent power management company, is assisting Miami-Dade Transportation & Public Works in enhancing the electrical system for the Metromover mass transit system. The system transported over 6.5 million passengers in 2023. This update is being backed by funding from the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) as a component of Miami-Dade County's $153 million effort to improve its automated train network's reliability. The project is anticipated to be a significant upgrade for the mass transit system.

news.headline: "Global Port Construction Projects Tracker Q2 2024 analysis includes top 20 projects per region with values and key operators."
news.summary: Dublin-based research firm, ResearchAndMarkets.com, has released the "Project Insight - Global Port Construction Projects (Q2 2024)" report. This report offers analysis on construction projects worldwide, detailing total project values and segmenting by stage and funding across different regions. It features the top 20 projects in each region, specifying country, stage, and project value. Additionally, the report includes rankings of major operators in the sector, highlighting leading contractors and consultants. This comprehensive analysis provides key insights into the global port construction industry landscape.

news.headline: Cadiz and RIC Energy join to construct California's largest hydrogen facility producing 50 tons of green hydrogen daily.
news.summary: Cadiz, Inc., a California-based water solutions company, has announced plans to build a hydrogen facility at the Cadiz Ranch site in Los Angeles that will exclusively utilize solar power. This facility aims to produce 50 tons of green hydrogen daily. The hydrogen generated will be used to fuel zero-emission trucks, cars, and provide electricity. This project is a significant step towards promoting sustainable energy sources and reducing carbon emissions.

news.headline: Pop artist Sean Danconia shines in Florida with collaborations at Nobu Hotel, Morikami, Michael Cardenas, illuminating art scene.
news.summary: This weekend in Miami, the renowned pop artist Sean Danconia is launching a series of creative collaborations, dynamic events, and new partnerships, aiming to brighten up the Florida art scene. With international acclaim, Danconia's unique pop-up experience is set to captivate audiences and showcase his innovative artistry.

news.headline: Business Jet appoints Hannah Vincent as Director of FBO Operations, previously Chief Brand Officer.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 23, 2024, a private aviation company located at Dallas Love Field named Business Jet revealed Hannah Vincent as the new Director of FBO Operations. Vincent, who previously held the role of Chief Brand Officer within the company, will now be in charge of managing operations in this capacity.

news.headline: Moovila integrates with Autotask PSA to enhance project management for MSPs, offering real-time tracking and automated timelines.
news.summary: In Mount Pleasant, South Carolina, on October 23, 2024, Moovila, a top AI-driven project automation platform for managed service providers (MSPs), announced its integration with Autotask PSA. This collaboration offers real-time visibility, automated project timelines, and advanced project risk management. This integration is expected to enhance efficiency for MSPs, allowing them to streamline operations and improve project outcomes.

news.headline: Dogecoin's price drops today due to overbought conditions, a potential golden cross, and macro factors, causing bearish sentiment.
news.summary: The price of Dogecoin has decreased today due to entering an overbought territory, with a potential golden cross approaching and macroeconomic influences intensifying the selling pressure on DOGE.

news.headline: Bitget COO believes security should be platform's responsibility, not users. Products must be intuitive.
news.summary: The Chief Operating Officer of Bitget, Vugar Usi Zade, emphasized the importance of intuitive products in the crypto industry. He stressed that crypto platforms must prioritize security measures to safeguard users.

news.headline: AITX's RAD-R secures 1M MAC Addresses.
University of Fukui researchers developed a decolorization method for textiles, able to reuse fabric and dyes; 60% of textile products are discarded before purchase.
news.summary: A groundbreaking method has been developed in FUKUI, Japan, as of October 23, 2024, that allows for the full extraction of dyes from fabrics. This innovation enables the recycling of both the decolorized clothing item and the dye itself. In the apparel sector, around 60% of textile goods are disposed of before being sold. This process signifies a significant advancement in sustainability within the industry, tackling waste and promoting circular practices.

news.headline: Movavi releases Video Editor 25 with major updates for usability and performance. Great for beginners and pros.
news.summary: Recently in Wildwood, Missouri, on October 23, 2024, Movavi unveiled its latest release in video editing software. The new Movavi Video Editor 25 introduces a range of groundbreaking updates aimed at improving usability and performance. This version is designed to cater to both experienced video editors and beginners, revolutionizing the editing experience.

news.headline: Lumotive debuts MD42 Development Kit in Shenzhen and Seattle, aiming to boost 3D sensing innovation.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on October 23, 2024, Lumotive, a leading company in optical semiconductor technology, unveiled the MD42 Development Kit. This innovative tool is aimed at boosting Lumotive's Open Development Platform (ODP) and accelerating progress in the field. The kit is expected to revolutionize the industry by providing developers with comprehensive features.

news.headline: Morphy's October auction drew new bidders competing for rarities, including a Husky sign at $59,040 and a Sinclair curb sign at $52,800.
news.summary: In a highly competitive auction, new enthusiastic participants engaged in bidding wars against Morphy's regulars for exclusive items. Among the notable sales were a resilient porcelain service station sign featuring a Husky logo, reaching an impressive $59,040. Additionally, a distinctive Sinclair 'Dino' curb sign commanded a noteworthy price of $52,800. Another standout piece was the Grizzly Gasoline 'tombstone' sign, closing at $25,830. The event took place in Denver, Pennsylvania on October 23, 2024, as part of Morphy's October Automobilia & Petroliana Auction.

news.headline: Alummikon Stairs unveils premium aluminum walkways & bridges for enhanced outdoor accessibility and safety.
news.summary: In Naples, Maine, on October 23, 2024, Alummikon Stairs unveiled its new line of premium aluminum above-ground walkways and bridges. These structures are created to improve accessibility and safety in outdoor settings. Emphasizing quality and innovation, Alummikon Stairs aims to provide solutions for various environments.

news.headline: Estu offers fee waiver for first 1,000 users and introduces Estu Fridays with exclusive discounts on popular brands for students.
news.summary: Estu, a digital financial services app, has introduced two new promotions in Boston on October 23, 2024. Students can now enjoy six months of waived fees and discounts every Friday on popular brands such as Uber and Starbucks. This offer provides significant savings and benefits to students during their weekly outings.

news.headline: Binance scraps minimum balance rule; now, all users can trade with 350+ collateral assets in Portfolio Margin accounts.
news.summary: Binance recently eliminated the 10,000 USDT minimum balance needed for Portfolio Margin accounts, enabling users to engage in trading with more than 350 collateral assets. This change offers greater flexibility and access for traders on the platform.

news.headline: Binance Futures changes leverage for USDⓈ-M contracts like TAOUSDT and TURBOUSDT, starting Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: Effective October 23, 2024, Binance Futures has made changes to the leverage and margin tiers for multiple perpetual contracts quoted in USDⓈ. Cryptocurrencies impacted by these updates include TAOUSDT and TURBOUSDT. Investors should take note of these adjustments when trading these contracts.

news.headline: HKMA warns against fraudulent sites, emails targeting Dah Sing Bank customers. Public urged to stay vigilant. #cybersecurity
news.summary: A caution has been raised by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority against deceptive websites and phishing emails aimed at customers of Dah Sing Bank. The public is advised to stay vigilant against potential threats.

news.headline: Denmark introduces Gefion, its inaugural AI supercomputer, to boost research in quantum computing, clean energy, and biotechnology.
news.summary: Denmark has introduced Gefion, its inaugural sovereign AI supercomputer, with the goal of advancing quantum computing, clean energy, and biotechnology by leveraging local innovation and fostering global partnerships. This high-performance computing system marks a significant step for Denmark in embracing cutting-edge technology.
